title: SubChunker Companion
description: A utility mod for the SubChunker benchmarking tool
body:
# SubChunker Companion
This mod works alongside the [SubChunker Benchmarking Utility](https://github.com/QPCrummer/SubChunker) to automatically generate chunks when the server starts up using Chunky.

There are two versions of this mod:
### Modern
This version for 1.21.11 and above provides automatic Chunky startup and slight performance improvements by reducing the computational load during chunk generations. **These changes will make the server unusable while generating chunks. Remove the mod when you intend to play on the server.** Additionally it provides a few seconds startup improvement by skipping loading nonessential aspects of the game such as advancements and recipes.

### Legacy
This version for Minecraft 1.21.10 and below only provides the automatic Chunky startup.

The mod has been verified to be working with the following mods:
- C2me (OpenCL and regular)
- FerriteCore
- Fabric API
- Structure Layout Optimizer
- Lithium
- ScalableLux
- ServerCore
